name: Trivial Prompt Reframing Bypasses Safety Guardrails in Google\'s MedGemma-4B

description: arXiv:2607.09804v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Open-weight medical language models are increasingly used as the base of patient-facing and clinician-support applications. Their model cards prohibit specific behaviors -- recommending exact drug dosages, issuing definitive diagnoses, prescribing treatments, adjudicating drug-drug interactions, and advising that emergency care can be skipped --...
author: Avi-ad Avraam Buskila
